since_last: 45% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.69%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 45% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -1.52% · Gold -2.30% · Nasdaq100 -1.87%. 45% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.69%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.69%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.07%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -13.50%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +6.41%, AVAV +5.87%, LSCC +5.71%, HON +5.70%, CBRS +5.34%. Laggards: TSLA -13.50%, GOOGL -6.81%, CRNC -5.96%, PATH -4.86%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.15% at $117.74
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
